mapper.sql: a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND a.published_at IS NOT NULL AND a.published_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)
a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, c.name AS category_name, c.slug AS category_slug, a.is_pinned AS pinned, a.reading_minutes, a.view_count, a.published_at, a.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.visible = 1
INNER JOIN article_tag article_tag_filter ON article_tag_filter.article_id = a.id INNER JOIN tag tag_filter ON tag_filter.id = article_tag_filter.tag_id AND tag_filter.slug = #{tagSlug} AND tag_filter.visible = 1
WHERE
AND c.slug = #{categorySlug}
AND ( a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content_plain LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.slug, a.summary, a.content_html, c.name AS category_name, c.slug AS category_slug, a.is_pinned AS pinned, a.allow_comment, a.word_count, a.reading_minutes, a.view_count, a.meta_title, a.meta_description, a.canonical_url, a.published_at, a.updated_at FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.visible = 1 WHERE AND a.slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.description, 0 AS article_count FROM tag t INNER JOIN article_tag at ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE at.article_id = #{articleId} AND t.visible = 1 ORDER BY t.sort_order, t.name

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.description, COUNT(a.id) AS article_count FROM category c LEFT JOIN article a ON a.category_id = c.id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND a.published_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE c.visible = 1 GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.sort_order, c.name

SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.description, COUNT(a.id) AS article_count FROM tag t LEFT JOIN article_tag at ON at.tag_id = t.id LEFT JOIN article a ON a.id = at.article_id AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND a.visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND a.published_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE t.visible = 1 GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.sort_order, t.name

SELECT FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.visible = 1 WHERE AND (a.published_at < #{publishedAt} OR (a.published_at = #{publishedAt} AND a.id < #{id})) ORDER BY a.published_at DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.visible = 1 WHERE AND (a.published_at > #{publishedAt} OR (a.published_at = #{publishedAt} AND a.id > #{id})) ORDER BY a.published_at, a.id LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT , COUNT(shared_at.tag_id) AS shared_tag_count FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = a.category_id AND c.visible = 1 LEFT JOIN article_tag candidate_at ON candidate_at.article_id = a.id LEFT JOIN article_tag shared_at ON shared_at.article_id = #{articleId} AND shared_at.tag_id = candidate_at.tag_id WHERE AND a.id != #{articleId} GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY (c.slug = #{categorySlug}) DESC, shared_tag_count DESC, a.published_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT target_path FROM url_redirect WHERE old_slug = #{oldSlug} AND enabled = 1 LIMIT 1
